scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter uppercase font-black
scale.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-cyan-400

rules: Headings should have tight letter spacing.
Labels must be uppercase with wide spacing.
Use black-on-black layers to ground neon colors.
Never use pure white #FFFFFF for backgrounds. Always dark void.
Glow effects should use drop-shadow with cyan or magenta.
Use Tetris Grid for Games Gallery: asymmetrical spanning.
Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
Mobile-first: default to grid-cols-1 on small screens.

cards.classes: bg-black/40 border border-cyan-500/30 hover:border-cyan-500/80 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,240,255,0.1)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(0,240,255,0.3)] transition-all duration-300

hero_background.description: Deep space nebula background, vibrant cyan and magenta cosmic dust
hero_background.usage: Fallback for 3D canvas or textured overlay for hero section

nfg_crash.description: Futuristic spaceship crashing, neon cyan and magenta glow
nfg_crash.usage: Featured game poster in hero or bento grid

nfg_wordwich.description: Glowing neon letters stacked like a sandwich in deep space
nfg_wordwich.usage: Bento grid card image for NFG Wordwich

nfg_hangman.description: Futuristic glowing neon hangman game in deep space
nfg_hangman.usage: Bento grid card image for NFG Hangman

nfg_wordwheel.description: Glowing neon roulette wheel made of alphabet letters
nfg_wordwheel.usage: Bento grid card image for NFG Wordwheel

rules: Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile devices.
Overlay hero images with max bg-black/50 for readability.

animations.hover: Elements scale up slightly (scale-105) with intensified neon drop-shadows.
animations.entrance: Staggered fade-up for grid items using Framer Motion.
animations.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for a kinetic texture of '@y666.suf TikTok Live' running across the screen.

specific_instructions: HERO: Use React Three Fiber to render a dark cosmic space scene. Use `<Stars>`, `<Sparkles>`, and `<Float>` from drei. Overlay text should be massive, glowing, and punchy.
GAMES GRID: Implement the Bento Grid protocol. NFG Crash is the Hero block (col-span-full md:col-span-8 row-span-2). Use the provided AI-generated game posters for cards.
LEADERBOARD: Use Shadcn UI Table but heavily customize it with Retro-Futurism style (black background, cyan/magenta thin borders, monospace fonts for scores).
TIKTOK CTA: Bold marquee text displaying '@y666.suf', pushing viewers to TikTok live.
NAVIGATION: Fixed top glassmorphism bar with glowing border on scroll.
TESTING: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.

rules: Ensure text over neon elements has sufficient contrast.
Focus states must use prominent cyan ring.
Support prefers-reduced-motion for the 3D canvas and marquees.
